summary: The South Bay is on a funding sprint: SiFive (Santa Clara) and Nexthop AI (Santa Clara) each landed $400M-plus this month, while AI startups from San Jose to Palo Alto pulled in over $2.5B across 28 rounds since early March. On the hiring front, seven local companies are actively growing headcount, though two are trimming sails—a mixed signal as capital flows faster than jobs.
